requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3 与危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3 與危險貨物文件

summary.en: Landed or air transport of lithium storage modules to Iceland normally requires transport evidence compliant with UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Part III, subsection 38.3, plus route-specific dangerous-goods declarations and labels matching actual model, chemistry, state of charge, and packaging.
summary.zh: 向冰岛运输锂电储能模块（海运或空运）通常需要符合《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分 38.3 的运输证据，并结合实际型号、化学体系、荷电状态和包装条件匹配对应危险货物申报和标签。
summary.zht: 向冰島運輸鋰電儲能模組（海運或空運）通常需要符合《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分 38.3 的運輸證據，並依據實際型號、化學體系、荷電狀態和包裝條件匹配對應的危險貨物申報與標籤。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3

summary.en: China exporters often hold UN 38.3 reports and lithium-transport documents for outbound goods. These records are useful for voyage planning, but Iceland shipment planning still requires exact route, mode, state-of-charge, and document checks in line with destination logistics and carrier rules.
summary.zh: 中国出口企业通常持有 UN 38.3 报告和锂电出运文件，这些记录可用于航线规划，但冰岛运输还需要按目的地物流和承运人规则核对路线、运输方式、荷电状态和文件。
summary.zht: 中國出口企業通常持有 UN 38.3 報告和鋰電出運文件，這些記錄可用于航線規劃，但冰島運輸仍需按目的地物流和承運人規則核對路線、運輸方式、荷電狀態和文件。

standards_or_laws: China outbound dangerous-goods transport records for lithium batteries

gap.en: UN 38.3 itself is a safety gate, not an Iceland market-placement proof. Exporters should also keep exact mode-specific SDS, packing instructions, lithium battery net mass, and carrier declarations for the actual Iceland-bound shipment.
gap.zh: UN 38.3 本身是运输安全门槛，不是冰岛市场准入证明。出口商还应为冰岛发运准备实际航线/航运方式对应的 SDS、包装说明、电池净重和承运人申报。
gap.zht: UN 38.3 本身是運輸安全門檻，不是冰島市場准入證明。出口商還應為冰島發運準備實際航線／運輸方式對應的 SDS、包裝說明、電池淨重和承運人申報。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated lithium-battery transport routes where mode and dangerous-goods obligations apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China outbound dangerous-goods transport but not a substitute for Iceland destination market approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Match transport test summaries and dangerous-goods documentation to each model and route to Iceland. Model-level variance can change carrier acceptance requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将运输测试摘要和危险货物文件按每个型号和冰岛路线进行匹配。型号差异可能改变承运人验收要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將運輸測試摘要和危險貨物文件按每個型號和冰島路線進行匹配。型號差異可能改變承運人驗收要求。
